primary_paper.title: A comprehensive analysis of the B0 -> K*0 mu+ mu- decay
primary_paper.notes: HEPData supplementary archive obtained 2026-04-28 from https://www.hepdata.net/download/submission/ins3094698/original. Contains 6 fit configurations (config_1..config_6) each with results + stat/syst/total correlation matrices in both YAML and JSON. Paper text explicitly directs readers to the HEPData page for systematic uncertainties and full observable results.

hepdata_configs.config_1: Partially massive model, CP-asymmetries fixed to 0, Si basis, standard q^2 binning
hepdata_configs.config_2: Partially massive model, CP-asymmetries fixed to 0, Pi basis (P5' anomaly observable), standard q^2 binning
hepdata_configs.config_3: Fully massive model in all q^2 bins, CP-asymmetries=0, Si basis, standard q^2 binning
hepdata_configs.config_4: Massless model q^2>1.1 GeV^2, CP-asymmetries floated, Si basis, standard q^2 binning
hepdata_configs.config_5: Fully massless model, CP-asymmetries=0, Pi basis, standard q^2 binning
hepdata_configs.config_6: Partially massive, CP-asymmetries=0, Si basis, half-sized q^2 binning

hepdata_q2_bins_standard: 10 bins from [0.06, 0.98] up through above-resonance region (see config_*_results.json indep['values'])

auxiliary_sources.name: flavio
auxiliary_sources.purpose: SM and BSM predictions for B -> K* mu mu observables

auxiliary_sources.name: wilson
auxiliary_sources.purpose: Wilson coefficient running and basis transformations
